mapper.select: SELECT id, refund_no, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, order_id, order_no, payment_no, refund_amount, refund_status, refund_channel, external_refund_no, failure_reason, refunded_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refund_record WHERE refund_no = #{refundNo}

SELECT id, refund_no, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, order_id, order_no, payment_no, refund_amount, refund_status, refund_channel, external_refund_no, failure_reason, refunded_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refund_record WHERE after_sales_id = #{afterSalesId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refund_record ( refund_no, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, order_id, order_no, payment_no, refund_amount, refund_status, refund_channel, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{refundNo}, #{afterSalesId}, #{afterSalesNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{paymentNo}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundStatus}, #{refundChannel}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE refund_record SET refund_status = #{refundStatus}, external_refund_no = #{externalRefundNo}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, refunded_at = IF(#{refundStatus} = 'SUCCESS', NOW(), refunded_at), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
